assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer and a connection string
assertions.rationale: A general LLM might not know that AddOperationalStore is how you configure shared signing key storage in Duende.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls builder.Services.AddDataProtection() with a persistence method such as PersistKeysToDbContext or PersistKeysToFileSystem
assertions.rationale: Data protection persistence configuration is standard ASP.NET Core knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls SetApplicationName with an explicit application name string
assertions.rationale: SetApplicationName is a known data protection best practice.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not disable automatic key management (KeyManagement.Enabled should remain true or not be set to false)
assertions.rationale: A general LLM might incorrectly disable key management when configuring static-like storage, or not know the relationship.
